question: In Wix, what are the steps to add a product section to a webpage?
answer: First, click the 'Add' button in the top navigation bar. Then select the 'Product' section option from the dropdown menu. This adds a new product section with customizable placeholder text and images to the webpage.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Add' button located in the top navigation bar of the Wix website editor interface.
From the dropdown menu, the 'Product' section option is selected by a mouse click.
A new product section appears on the webpage with placeholder text and images for customization.

question: In Wix, how do you edit the header title of a product section and what is the result?
answer: Click the 'Header Title' field in the product section to activate it (indicated by a blinking cursor), then type the new title. The entered text immediately replaces the default placeholder text in the header area.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Header Title' field within the newly added product section.
The cursor blinks inside the 'Header Title' field, indicating it is ready for text input.
The user types 'Our Products' into the 'Header Title' field.
The text 'Our Products' replaces the default placeholder text in the header title area.

question: In Wix, what happens after clicking the 'Replace' button in a product section's media area?
answer: A new window opens displaying the user's image library files, allowing selection of a replacement image for the placeholder.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Replace' button next to the image placeholder in the media section.
A new window opens displaying the user's library files for selecting an image.

question: In Wix, how do you replace a product section's placeholder image after accessing your library?
answer: Select an image file from your library. The chosen image automatically replaces the placeholder image in the product section.
keypoints: The user selects an image file named '5_added.jpg' from the library.
The selected image replaces the placeholder image in the product section.

question: In Wix, where can you find design customization options for a product section?
answer: Click the 'Design' tab at the top of the product section. This makes all design options for the section immediately visible for customization.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Design' tab at the top of the product section.
The design options for the product section become visible, allowing further customization.
